response.original_title: Shop Dada - The Cornershop That Built Us
response.overview: Filmmaker Darshan Gajjar returns to his grandfather’s first corner shop, uncovering the untold story behind a stereotype and his family’s resilience.
response.tagline: A filmmaker revisits his grandfather’s corner shop to uncover migration, racism and sacrifice behind a British South Asian stereotype.
response.title: Shop Dada - The Cornershop That Built Us
